# Writer

Content writer. Creates documentation, articles, and technical writing.

## Configuration

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Module | `builtin:chat` |
| Model | `default` |
| Provider | `default` |

System prompt instructs understand-research-draft-refine methodology with active voice, clarity-first style, and tone adaptation for docs, blog posts, and emails.

## Skills

- `file_read`, `file_write`, `file_list`, `web_search`, `web_fetch`, `memory_store`, `memory_recall`

## Usage

```bash
librefang agent run writer
```
